intro: All teachers complete required trainings including CPR, references, medical clearances, and background checks.

educators.name: Charlene Kam
education: B.A. Chemistry (minor in Biology and Secondary Education), University of Miami (1993)
MA Ed Specialization in Montessori, St. Catherine University (2022)

Montessori instructor for Online Teacher Training Center (MontessoriLive)

bio: Founder/Director of The Children's House - Auburn Montessori (est. 1997).
Intention: To continue her work at Auburn Montessori School, keeping true to the Montessori philosophy to cultivate a desire to learn in ever changing diverse environments.

educators.name: Janice Szgar
education: Pursuing a PhD in EFLT (Educational Foundations, Leadership, and Technology) at Auburn University
bio: An educator with a strong interest in child-centered learning and environmental education, Janice is currently supporting students in a Montessori environment that fosters curiosity and independence through inquiry-based learning.
Her experience also includes serving as the Lead Teacher for Grade 3 at Auburn Classical Academy, where she supported students' academic growth through engaging, inquiry-based instruction.
